protein_name: May play a role in the polymerization of tubulin into microtubules, microtubule bundling and the stabilization of existing microtubules, thus maintaining the integrity of the microtubule network. May play a role in mitotic spindle assembly and nuclear envelope breakdown. Belongs to the TPPP family. Widely expressed. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
